resourceTemplates.name: handinger-image
resourceTemplates.title: Generate Website Screenshot
resourceTemplates.description: Capture a screenshot for the supplied website URL through Handinger's image endpoint.

resourceTemplates.name: handinger-markdown
resourceTemplates.title: Extract Website Content
resourceTemplates.description: Retrieve webpage content from Handinger as markdown.

resourceTemplates.name: handinger-markdown
resourceTemplates.title: Extract Website Content
resourceTemplates.description: Retrieve webpage content from Handinger as html.

resourceTemplates.name: handinger-llm
resourceTemplates.title: Run LLM Prompt Against Website
resourceTemplates.description: Send a prompt together with a website URL to Handinger's llm endpoint so the service can answer using the page content. The api_key query parameter is omitted because it is injected at runtime.
